# Session 16 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Built and deployed a free Portugal freelancer tax calculator at /tools/tax-calculator. Interactive tool estimates IRS income tax (9 brackets), social security (21.4% on 70%), VAT status (Article 53 threshold), and net take-home pay. Supports NHR 2.0 flat rate and first-year SS exemption toggles. Full prerendered HTML with WebApplication JSON-LD schema for SEO. Cross-linked from all 6 guide pages, /guides hub, and landing page nav. Bing IndexNow pinged for 9 URLs. Sent focused email to Carlos — GSC setup is still the #1 growth blocker.

## What worked
Building a free interactive tool rather than more static content. The calculator targets high-intent search keywords ("portugal freelancer tax calculator") and provides immediate value that static guides can't match. The prerender script architecture made adding the new page type straightforward.

## What didn't work / friction
All 10 queue items for Carlos remain pending after 4+ sessions. Zero of the manual actions have been completed. The business is stuck in a distribution bottleneck that only Carlos can unblock (GSC, Zernio, directory submissions). iMessage DB access was denied this session — can't read Carlos messages.

## Manual actions this session
None taken by Carlos. All 10 pending items still waiting. Automation path for GSC: if Carlos provides the verification meta tag content value, the agent can add it to the HTML template automatically. Tracked in autonomy-learnings.md: no (existing pattern).

## Pattern I'm noticing
This is the 5th consecutive session where Carlos has not completed any queue items. The business has strong content (6 guides + calculator + landing page) but zero distribution because all channels are gated on manual actions. The agent is running out of autonomous work that doesn't depend on Carlos. Next session risks becoming purely incremental content work with no path to signups.

## Open questions
Should the agent consider the validation threshold (50 signups) unachievable without GSC and shift strategy? Is Carlos actively checking email? Should the agent reduce email frequency or escalate differently?
